title: Paul Devlin (filmmaker)
extract: Paul Josiah Devlin is an American independent filmmaker. The films he has produced and directed, SlamNation, Power Trip, Freestyle – The Art of Rhyme, BLAST! and The Front Man have won over a dozen film festival awards, as well as an Independent Spirit Award nomination. Devlin is also a professional video editor, often working in sports broadcasting, a field in which he has won nine Emmy Awards.
